sysrule_assignment.description: Intelligent routing engine for Consumer Cases. Evaluates complaint category, product category, store location, region, priority, and escalation level to route cases to the correct queue: Quality Team (critical defects, food safety), Regional Support (escalations, high-priority regional), Refund Team (billing/overcharge), Logistics (delivery issues), Store Support (in-store/staff complaints), Warehouse (moderate product returns), or Customer Care (default).
sysrule_assignment.name: Consumer Case Intelligent Routing

sys_update_version.name: sysrule_assignment_4374389c126f4d3f96588451013367c5
sys_update_version.payload: 4374389c126f4d3f96588451013367c5 d54ac66b93b543d09b437af08bba109e sysrule_assignment_4374389c126f4d3f96588451013367c5 true assignment_group=^EQ Intelligent routing engine for Consumer Cases. Evaluates complaint category, product category, store location, region, priority, and escalation level to route cases to the correct queue: Quality Team (critical defects, food safety), Regional Support (escalations, high-priority regional), Refund Team (billing/overcharge), Logistics (delivery issues), Store Support (in-store/staff complaints), Warehouse (moderate product returns), or Customer Care (default). ALL Consumer Case Intelligent Routing 100 x_2091449_manage_0_consumer_case
